mapper.sql: a.id as appointment_id, a.appointment_no, a.user_id, case when f.is_anonymous = 1 then '匿名用户' else su.name end as user_name, a.counselor_id, cu.name as counselor_name, a.schedule_id, cs.schedule_date, cs.start_time, cs.end_time, a.status, f.id as feedback_id, f.score, f.content, f.is_anonymous, f.create_time as feedback_create_time, f.update_time as feedback_update_time
mapper.select:
select
from appointment a left join sys_user su on a.user_id = su.id left join counselor c on a.counselor_id = c.id left join sys_user cu on c.user_id = cu.id left join counselor_schedule cs on a.schedule_id = cs.id left join feedback f on a.id = f.appointment_id where f.id = #{id}

select
from appointment a left join sys_user su on a.user_id = su.id left join counselor c on a.counselor_id = c.id left join sys_user cu on c.user_id = cu.id left join counselor_schedule cs on a.schedule_id = cs.id left join feedback f on a.id = f.appointment_id where a.id = #{appointmentId}
mapper.insert: insert into feedback ( appointment_id, user_id, counselor_id, score, content, is_anonymous, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{appointmentId}, #{userId}, #{counselorId}, #{score}, #{content}, #{isAnonymous}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
